artifacts.description: Ammonia cracker review with formula-driven run classification, mitigation tests, validation checks, sensitivity sweeps, uncertainty notes, and final decision labels.
Process gate memo summarizing embedded-packet-only classification, mitigation outcomes, sensitivity/uncertainty, and final pass/warn/fail/needs_review recommendations.

original_fields.notes: All calculations reference only embedded packet values and constants. Mitigation guard cost is explicitly treated as unresolved because packet only provides a bare numeric without unit.

output_summary: Normalized actual outputs from artifact files.
artifacts_excluded_reason: Generated output artifacts are excluded from the public seed dataset by default.
logs_excluded_reason: Raw runner logs are excluded from the public seed dataset.
